allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:7474/api/auth/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"hr@bunyod.tj","password":"password"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - token received'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:7474/api/auth/login \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"email":"admin@holding.tj","password":"password"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('access_token',''\)[:50]\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress -notlike '127.*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*'} | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(e['id'], e.get\('documents','NO_FIELD'\)\) for e in data['data'][:2]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); matches=[e for e in data['data'] if e.get\('documents'\)]; print\('Found with docs:', [\(e['id'],e['documents']\) for e in matches]\)")
Bash(xargs -I{} docker exec hrms_frontend sh -c "cat {} | tr ',' '\\n' | grep -i 'snils\\|СНИЛС' | head -5")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✅ Логин работает' if r.get\('access_token'\) else '❌ '+str\(r\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✅ Telegram работает' if r.get\('ok'\) else '❌ '+str\(r\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Записей: {len\(d\)}'\); print\(str\(d[0]\)[:200] if d else 'ПУСТО'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if d.get\('ok'\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Token OK' if 'access_token' in d else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d, list\) else d\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=data[0] if data else {}; print\('lastEvent:', r.get\('lastEvent'\)\); print\('selfieEventIds:', r.get\('selfieEventIds'\)\); print\('Keys:', list\(r.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=data[0] if isinstance\(data,list\) and data else {}; print\('lastEvent:', r.get\('lastEvent'\)\); print\('selfieEventIds:', r.get\('selfieEventIds'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d.get\('id'\), d.get\('deviceName'\), '|', d.get\('officeName'\), '|', d.get\('direction'\), '|', d.get\('lastSeenIp'\)\) for d in \(data if isinstance\(data,list\) else data.get\('data',[]\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['employeeName'][:20], '|', r.get\('lastEvent',{}\).get\('deviceName'\), '|', r.get\('selfieEventIds',[]\)\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['employeeName'][:18], '|', r.get\('lastEvent',{}\).get\('deviceName'\)\) for r in data[:6]]")
